overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a humanoid combat robot walking through an affluent futuristic residential district. The robot traverses a sunlit concrete pathway lined with palm trees and contemporary architecture, transitioning from open sky into a covered walkway beneath a luxury villa.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential pathway with tropical landscaping

agents.ego_description: robot striding confidently along the sunlit pathway away from the camera

entered.detail: white car covered with a protective tarp parked beside the pathway
tall tropical palm trees lining the background against the blue sky
dense green hedges running parallel to the walkway
sleek contemporary building with dark metallic walls and large glass windows
light-colored concrete walkway with visible crack patterns

segments.scene_description: The robot walks away from the camera along a sunlit concrete pathway in an upscale neighborhood. A covered white vehicle sits parked on the left, while tall palm trees and manicured hedges line the path. A sleek modern villa with dark walls stands prominently on the right.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: low concrete seating platform integrated into the landscaping
modern metallic trash can beside the pathway

segments.scene_description: The robot proceeds along the pathway as the modern villa's wall looms closer on the right. A concrete bench and trash receptacle appear on the left side of the path. The covered vehicle falls behind as the architecture becomes more dominant in the frame.

events.description: walks under the villa's cantilevered overhang into partial shade

agents.ego_description: robot walking into the shaded area beneath the building's overhanging upper floor

entered.detail: cantilevered upper floor of the villa creating a covered walkway below
large glass doors and windows of the villa entrance
white cylindrical outdoor seating or planter near the pathway

segments.scene_description: The robot enters a covered walkway beneath the villa's overhanging upper floor. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as the glass entrance of the villa becomes visible on the right. The tropical hedges recede into the background while the pathway continues under the building's protective canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a combat robot as it moves from a bright, open residential street into the shaded depths of a luxury villa's architecture. It begins on a sunlit concrete pathway, trailing the robot past a parked white vehicle and manicured hedges under the canopy of tall palm trees. As the robot proceeds, the open sky narrows and the sleek dark walls of a modern villa loom closer on the right, while a concrete bench and trash receptacle pass by on the left. The scene then shifts as the robot enters a covered walkway beneath the building's overhanging upper floor, causing the lighting to transition from brilliant sunlight to dappled shade. Finally, the tropical greenery recedes into the background as the camera follows the robot toward the villa's glass entrance under the protective canopy.
